title: 6Pcs Norfolk Pine Stems,18''Real Touch Artificial Pine Branch Christmas Foliage Picks Tree Filler Branches for Xmas Vase Filler Wreath Garland Home Decor (Pinecone)
features: 【Package Quantity】Include 6 Pcs Christmas artificial pine branches,with pine cones and red berries,each branch has 5 forks,the christmas greenery stems retain the original deep green hue and lush fullness,just like natural pine needles,lifelike charm winter decorations.

【Large Size Pinestem 】Each Christmas artificial greenery pinestem measures 45cm/17.7 in,perfect for making xmas wreaths,pine garland,christmas tree and gift box decoration,to create Christmas atmosphere indoor /outdoor decorations.

【Lifelike Xmas Pine Stems】Green fake pine branch picks are made of soft glue,can be naturally droopy, life like and delicate; built-in thin wire can be bent at will,which is the perfect winter time decoration,easy to pair with many christmas themed decor.

【Christmas atmosphere pairing】The soft and drooping faux green pine branches as winter deko,fit for bedrooms,living rooms,kitchens,and wall wreaths.Fake Pine branches plant blend with various Christmas backgrounds,lights, trees,etc., creating a beautiful holiday picture.

【Versatile Pine Branches for Decoration】Artificial Christmas Pine branches can match any christmas themed decorations,as making Christmas pine garlands,vase arrangements, Christmas wreaths decorations,Christmas tree decorations, Christmas table,Christmas fireplace, porch,winter wedding,festival parties,outdoor parties.
description: Product Description 6Pcs Artificial Norfolk Pine Branches For Christmas,Birthday,Wedding,Party Decorations
